items.title: Open local work
items.summary: Start Center resolves the local folder entry through the workspace open command.

items.title: Command palette bridge
items.summary: Migration hints keep the imported shortcut mapped to the canonical command palette command.

items.title: Release-truth terms
items.summary: Glossary cards define claim, lifecycle, freshness, source, and client-scope terms.

items.title: Migration vocabulary
items.summary: Glossary cards name exact, translated, partial, shimmed, and unsupported migration outcomes.

items.title: Docs mirror fallback
items.summary: Help search and why-now cards disclose when docs came from the verified mirror snapshot.

items.title: Restore from checkpoint
items.summary: Recovery-first help routes restore guidance through the canonical restore command.

items.title: Export support evidence
items.summary: Recovery-first help records active help-pack versions and fallback state before export.

items.title: Guided learning digest placeholder
items.summary: Help search discloses that the guided learning digest is not installed and keeps local work available.
